ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-17-2017 Continued To Feb-07-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Franchesca Callejo for Bertha Joung.

The Court raised the issue of the document regarding death and appointment not bearing a seal of the Court. Ms. Callejo stated that she spoke with Maria (Daughter of Ian Stewart) and solicitor (Attorney that prepared the document), and that she has no control over documents in England. Ms. Callejo also spoke of the Decedent's elderly Sister being in need of funds for continuing care needs, requested that distribution to Mr. Leahy be held, that all other distribution be made, and stated that the bulk of the Estate is ready to be distributed and that she has expressed urgency to the parties. The First and Final Account, etc. is continued to February 7, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court will not grant a preliminary distribution now. If Ms. Callejo does not obtain the documents, she can present something else in support of a preliminary distribution.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Duong. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
